topics.title: Joey Butterfugo and David Creif Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout from a heated confrontation between Artie and producer David Creif regarding Joey Butterfugo's past actions and potential media projects.

topics.title: Elton John Call and Medical Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a phone call from Elton John who performs several songs before the show transitions into discussions regarding Jeff the Drunk's medical condition, listener feedback on weight loss contests, and news regarding Chris Albrecht's resignation from HBO.

topics.title: Legal System and Career Advice
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of the legal system in high-profile cases, a caller's struggle with alcohol and therapy, and a listener's dilemma regarding choosing between an imaginary career path and a practical job.

topics.title: Medical Consultation and Promotional Offers
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding potential performance opportunities for Eric the Midget followed by a medical consultation with a doctor concerning a severe bone infection on Jeff's buttocks.

topics.title: American Idol Fix Allegations and Client Party Incident
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of a fixed voting process on American Idol, the promotion of a local band, and an incident where an uninvited engineer attended a private client party.

topics.title: NASCAR Promotion and Trivia Contest
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal dynamics regarding NASCAR promotions before a guest participates in a trivia game for a cash prize.

topics.title: Sexual Experiences and Offerings
topics.summary: The show features a guest who discusses her past experiences with threesomes, participates in a trivia game, and negotiates payment for performing on the program.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Sexual Experiences
topics.summary: The show features a conversation regarding a caller's relationship with her boyfriend, followed by a pre-recorded segment involving porn star Nicole Sheridan and an interview with comedian Lisa Lampanelli.

topics.title: Lisa Lampanelli Discusses Relationship and Career
topics.summary: The show features Lisa Lampanelli discussing her new relationship with a comedian, her upcoming roast of Andy Dick, and her appearance in the film Delta Farce.

topics.title: Lisa Lampanelli and Howard Stern Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Lisa Lampanelli regarding her career, upcoming film projects, and personal life before transitioning to a phone call with Jesse regarding his father's actions.

topics.title: Family Dynamics and Identity of a Public Figure's
topics.summary: The show features an interview with the daughter of a public figure, who discusses her personal growth, the impact of her father's actions on her life, and her perspective on his recent media appearances.

topics.title: American Idol Voting Integrity and Health News
topics.summary: The studio discusses allegations of rigged voting on American Idol, the release of a 1980 radio clip featuring Howard Stern, a medical study linking HPV to throat cancer, and proposed regulations for New York strip club dancers.

topics.title: American Idol, Celebrity News, and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a bizarre double homicide in California, the latest developments on American Idol, celebrity sightings, and various news items including Al Sharpton's comments on Mitt Romney.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including upcoming Broadway performances, presidential visits following natural disasters, international politics involving Tony Blair and Iraq, rising gas prices, celebrity appointments for the World Food Program, and various upcoming comedy tours.
